# Repository Instructions For GitHub Copilot

This file is a GitHub Copilot entry point only. Keep GitHub Copilot-specific
integration guidance under `adapters/github-copilot/` and keep reusable
architecture semantics in `general-semantic-contracts.md` and `skills/**/`.

Follow repository-root `adapters/github-copilot/copilot-instructions.md`, then
the contract hierarchy in repository-root `AGENTS.md`.

Do not duplicate ADR, quality scenario, risk, traceability, metadata, arc42, or
pull-request-review rules here. Add durable rules to the canonical skill or
adapter source instead.
